items.title: Asked Baba Miller about his ability to handle the ball and make plays for his teammates
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Baba Miller about his ability to handle the ball and make plays for his teammates

When I asked him about where he is most comfortable offensively as a basketball player, he said that he feels like he can fit into the style of play in the NBA with his "dynamic type of play style"

media.title: Source: Sixers to retain Adem Bona, guaranteeing 2026-27 salary
media.description: The Sixers could have waived Adem Bona at no cost on Monday. Instead, he will make just under $2.3 million – all guaranteed – in his third NBA season.
